name: SQL Server HA | FCI Install
description: Survey for setup_sql_fci.yml — SQL Server Failover Cluster Instance installation on WSFC cluster

spec.question_description: SQL Server SA account password. Store securely in vault.
SQL Server FCI network name (clients connect using this name). Max 15 chars.
Static IP for SQL Server FCI (clients connect to this IP). Must be free in 192.168.137.0/24.
Drive letter assigned to the shared iSCSI disk (without colon). SQL data, log and backup will be stored here.
Hostname of the primary cluster node. FCI is installed here first.
Hostname of the secondary cluster node. Added via AddNode after primary install.
